Home Families Movements Use Cases
atlas v0.5
Frieze quiet editorial culture
Swiss Grid typographic systems
Raw Postmodern anti-grid commerce
Techno-Futurism neon worldbuilding
Product Precision controlled interface density
Directory reference browsing
Quiet Lifestyle calm prestige

External Style Atlas

先被图像抓住，再被分类带走

这是一个风格聚合站，不是说明文档首页。首屏先给足够强的图像定调，再把人带到三个真正有用的入口：历史流派、当代网页家族、适用场景。

以后做站，不要只说“做成杂志感”或“做成黑白”。先选 movement，再选 web family，再选 structure，最后才写 prompt。

01

Choose A Movement

02

Choose A Family

03

Choose A Structure

04

Ship A Packet

Image-first shell. Neutral chrome. Drill down by movement, family, or use case.

Browse Families Browse Use Cases

Entry Routes

先按你最有把握的维度进去

首页只负责定调和导流。真正的解释要下钻到 families、movements 和 use cases。

Historical Movements

6

从 Bauhaus、Swiss、Memphis 到 Cyberpunk，看设计谱系如何演化到今天的网站语言。

适合先看历史来源、核心特征和后代分支。

Open route

Contemporary Web Families

9

从 editorial、Swiss、product precision、raw anti-grid 到 neon futurism，看今天网站最常见的表现家族。

适合先找网页呈现方式和参考网站。

Open route

Use Cases

7

按内容形状和任务选风格：出版、工具、品牌、图库、研究、发布页、灵感库。

适合先从场景反推 family 和 structure。

Open route

Current Families

Contemporary Web Families

今天网页里已经稳定成型的风格家族。它们回答的是‘现在的网站长什么样’，而不是历史谱系本身。

All families
Web Family

Magazine Editorial

Feature-led publishing surfaces. The fold behaves like a cover or lead spread, not like a generic SaaS hero.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxurySwiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

cultural publishingfeature homepagesbrand magazines
Open family
Web Family

Quiet Lifestyle Editorial

Calmer, slower, more collectible than classic magazine surfaces. The page feels like an issue, catalog, or taste-led brand world.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined Luxury

Best For

fashionlifestylecultural brands
Open family
Web Family

Swiss Typographic Grid

Order-forward, grid-led, typographic systems for archives, references, identities, and anything that must stay legible while it grows.

Historical Roots

Swiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

archivesidentity studiosreference libraries
Open family
Web Family

Product Precision Interface

Controlled, engineered, high-clarity product surfaces where state language, spacing, and UI logic outrank atmosphere.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional Modernism

Best For

AI toolstechnical productsplatform homepages
Open family
Web Family

Stage-Driven Showcase

A hero or first fold behaves like a stage. One image, scene, or world carries the page before the rest of the content unfolds.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxuryCyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Best For

campaignsflagship launchesfilm and entertainment
Open family
Web Family

Curated Reference Directory

Index-first, browse-first, filter-friendly. The homepage acts like a visual directory rather than a manifesto.

Historical Roots

Swiss / International Typographic StylePostmodern / Memphis

Best For

reference atlasestemplate librariesinspiration directories
Open family

Task Fit

Use Cases

如果你不是从审美出发，而是从‘我要做什么内容’出发，这一层会更快把你带到正确的 family 和 structure。

All use cases
Use Case

Style Atlas / Reference Library

适合风格库、灵感库、模板库和设计参考站。关键是先给图像入口，再给分类、再给详情页。

Primary Family

Curated Reference Directory

Structure

Catalog Explorer
Open use case
Use Case

Cultural Publishing / Editorial Front Page

适合文化出版、专题内容和杂志式首页。先做封面感，再做栏位和故事层级。

Primary Family

Magazine Editorial

Structure

Dossier / FeatureArchive Stack
Open use case
Use Case

Product / Tool / Platform

适合 AI 工具、产品官网、平台型页面。应该先清楚状态、价值和界面行为，再谈气质。

Primary Family

Product Precision Interface

Structure

Workbench / Tool ShellCatalog Explorer
Open use case
Use Case

Research / Knowledge System

适合研究报告、知识入口、设计系统与文档型网站。它需要可信、可扫描、可回访。

Primary Family

Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface

Structure

Archive StackDossier / Feature
Open use case
Use Case

Premium Lifestyle / Cultural Brand

适合生活方式、时尚、文化品牌。需要安静、质感和收藏感，而不是强行工具化。

Primary Family

Quiet Lifestyle Editorial

Structure

Dossier / FeatureCatalog Explorer
Open use case
Use Case

Creator / Anti-Template Launch

适合创作者品牌、反模板发布页和态度鲜明的个人项目。可以更大胆，但不能乱。

Primary Family

Playful Postmodern / Anti-Grid

Structure

Catalog ExplorerImmersive Stage
Open use case
Use Case

Gaming / Hardware / Future-Tech Launch

适合游戏、硬件、未来技术、世界观强的品牌发布页。舞台感和世界观要先成立。

Primary Family

Neon Techno-Futurist Interface

Structure

Immersive Stage
Open use case

Design History

Historical Movements

把历史谱系和网页家族拆开之后，风格判断才会稳定。这里看的是祖先语言，而不是现成模板。

All movements

1919-1933

Germany

Bauhaus / Functional Modernism

功能、工业和几何秩序优先。它把形式服从用途这件事系统化。

Descendant Families

Product Precision InterfaceEvidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
Open movement

1920s-1930s

France / Europe / US

Art Deco / Streamlined Luxury

几何装饰、流线感和高级感并存。今天它更多以精致和舞台感回到网页中。

Descendant Families

Quiet Lifestyle EditorialStage-Driven Showcase
Open movement

1950s-1970s

Switzerland

Swiss / International Typographic Style

网格、对齐、无衬线、秩序感。它是今天大量知识型、设计型、档案型网页的基础语法之一。

Descendant Families

Swiss Typographic GridEvidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
Open movement

1981-1988 and beyond

Italy

Postmodern / Memphis

反对过度理性和过度秩序，强调图案、冲突、俏皮和反规范的组合方式。

Descendant Families

Playful Postmodern / Anti-GridCurated Reference Directory
Open movement

1950s roots / 2010s-2020s web revival

Architecture roots / Web reinterpretation

Brutalism / Neo-Brutalism

结构裸露、边界鲜明、不讨好。网页里的 neo-brutalism 往往更鲜艳、更可用。

Descendant Families

Playful Postmodern / Anti-Grid
Open movement

1980s-present

Science fiction / game and tech culture

Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

高饱和霓虹、黑夜城市、技术感界面、世界观驱动。它更像视觉文化分支。

Descendant Families

Neon Techno-Futurist InterfaceStage-Driven Showcase
Open movement

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.

Updated 2026-03-30 · design.zondev.top
